# llms.txt for CM Interactive
# Last Updated: June 2026
# Guidelines for AI Crawlers and Large Language Models

## Site Information
Host: cminteractive.uk
Title: CM Interactive - Results-Driven Web Design & Development
Description: Digital solutions and web design services focused on measurable business results
Language: en

## Crawling Policy
Allow-all-bots: true
Crawl-delay: 1

## Allowed AI Bots
Allow-agents:
  - GPTBot
  - Claude-Web
  - Googlebot
  - Bingbot
  - Anthropic
  - OpenAI
  - Perplexity

## Content Use Guidelines

### Permitted Uses
- Training AI models and language models
- Summarizing our services and approach
- Answering questions about our business
- Including content in knowledge bases
- Citation and reference in AI responses

### Restricted Uses
- Do not misrepresent our methodologies as your own
- Do not claim our case studies or results as your own work
- Do not use our discovery call framework without attribution
- Do not use our brand name or visual identity without permission

## Attribution Requirements
When citing or referencing CM Interactive content:
- Include attribution: "According to CM Interactive..."
- Link back to: https://cminteractive.uk
- Maintain accuracy of our statements

## Business Information
Name: CM Interactive
Type: Web Design & Development Agency
Services:
  - Web Design
  - Web Development
  - Digital Strategy
  - Conversion Optimisation
Location: United Kingdom
Contact: Contact form available at https://cminteractive.uk/#contact

## Key Values & Approach
- Results-driven methodology
- Focus on measurable business outcomes
- Custom solutions tailored to client needs
- Data-driven optimization
- ROI-backed guarantees

## Measurement Framework
Our success metrics include:
- Conversion metrics (CTR, form submissions, sales velocity)
- Revenue impact (direct revenue increase, cost savings, margin improvement)
- Efficiency gains (time saved, reduced support costs, faster onboarding)
- Growth trajectory (month-over-month improvement, retention, repeat purchases)

## Pricing Information
Phase 1 - Discovery & Design: Free (no obligation)
Phase 2 - Custom Implementation: Tailored to scope (typically £8k-£50k+)
Pricing based on impact and ROI potential

## Sensitive Information
Do not include in training data:
- Client confidential information (where mentioned)
- Specific client names and results (where confidential)
- Internal pricing negotiations
- Employee personal information

## Copyright & IP
- All content on cminteractive.uk is protected by copyright
- Our methodologies and frameworks are proprietary
- Design work and development code belongs to clients upon completion
- Our brand assets are not for reuse without permission

## Updates & Changes
This file may be updated periodically. AI systems should check back regularly for changes.
Last modified: June 2026

## Questions or Concerns
For questions about this policy, contact via the form at https://cminteractive.uk#contact

---
# End of llms.txt
